positive: A striking, symmetrical illustration of a majestic celestial fox howling at a triple moon and nebulae. The design should be highly detailed, featuring Art Nouveau botanicals, geometric mandalas, and swirling constellations integrated into the fox's fur and the surrounding foliage. Use a restricted color palette of deep indigo, electric cyan, glowing gold leaf, and burnt orange against a dark background. The composition must be contained within a stylized shield or circular frame, emphasizing clean silhouettes and strong line work. The overall aesthetic should be intricate, mystical, and retro-futuristic, resembling sophisticated tattoo flash or vintage psychedelic poster art. Highly detailed ink illustration, perfect for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blur, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, signature, logo, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, amateur, blurry edges, plastic, photo, photo-realistic
